title: pg_ripple Bidi Event v1.0
description: Wire format for bidirectional integration events emitted by pg_ripple v0.77.0+. All events carry a top-level 'version' discriminator for forward compatibility.

version.description: Wire format version discriminator. Always '1.0' for this schema.

event_id.description: Stable UUID for this event, used for idempotent delivery and linkback rendezvous.

subscription.description: Name of the pg_ripple subscription that emitted this event.

subject.description: IRI of the RDF subject (entity) this event describes.

source_graph.description: IRI of the named graph that is the source of the subject's triples. NULL for the default graph.

after.description: Full predicate → object snapshot after this transaction. Keys are predicate IRIs; values are decoded literals or IRI strings.

base.description: Sparse diff of previous values for changed predicates. Keys are predicate IRIs. Empty when the subject is new. Used by assert_cas() for optimistic locking.

subject_resolved.description: True when the subject IRI has been confirmed by the target system via record_linkback(). False (or absent) for the initial event on a new subject whose target ID is pending.

source_timestamp.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp extracted from the source payload (e.g. 'lastModified'). Present only when the mapping has a timestamp_path configured and diff mode was used.
